"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:04 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem843_verify_mobile_probe_result.json')
status_in=prev.get('status')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present':
    status='protocol_processing_selected'
    next_action='process real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
elif status_in=='only_real_response_missing' or ('real_claude_response' in missing and 'workflow_dispatch_results' not in missing and 'claude_runtime_state' not in missing):
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_real_response_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry real Claude response; dispatch and runtime proofs already present or not first missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif status_in=='runtime_missing_after_dispatch_result' or ('claude_runtime_state' in missing and 'workflow_dispatch_results' not in missing):
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_runtime_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry Claude runtime state proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='runtime_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch results'
else:
    status='unknown_route_no_queue'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-843 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'operator_device':'mobile_only','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_execute_bem843_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_next.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Execute BEM-843 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator mobile-only; no GitHub UI/computer instructions.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator mobile-only.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_execute_bem843_next.json','governance/reports/bem844_execute_bem843_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-843 next action by queuing the correct proof retry without requiring operator UI or computer')
